rows.label: tlk43100342_01_msg0001
rows.name:
They say there are some monsters
that encourage their buddies
to make them stronger.

rows.label: tlk43100342_01_msg0002
rows.name:
In a fight like that, I reckon
you should take out the one
doing the cheering first.

rows.label: tlk43100342_01_msg0003
rows.name:
I heard that from one of
my dad's Driver buddies.

rows.label: tlk43100342_01_msg0004
rows.name:
You gotta study up if you wanna
join the Invidian army, y'know!
